title: Be My Cat: A Film for Anne
original_title: Be My Cat: A Film for Anne
overview: An aspiring filmmaker goes to shocking extremes to convince Hollywood actress Anne Hathaway to star in his film. First entry in Adrian Țofei's spiritual trilogy which includes We Put the World to Sleep and Pure.
